steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content:
Start with the inequality and add $21$ to both sides:
$$ax-21\le14$$
$$ax\le35$$

steps.title: Use the direction of the inequality
steps.content:
The solution is written as $x\ge -7$, so dividing by $a$ must reverse the inequality. That means $a$ is negative, and
$$x\ge\frac{35}{a}$$

steps.title: Match the boundary value
steps.content:
Match the boundary to $-7$ and solve:
$$\frac{35}{a}=-7$$
$$35=-7a$$
$$a=-5$$
The answer is -5.
